case_title: CHAMBERLIN & ASSOCIATES VS OMC MANAGEMENT INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $899.10 FILED BY CHAMBERLIN & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT OMC MANAGEMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAMBERLIN & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OMC MANAGEMENT INC. $899.10 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $944.10, DEFENDANT, DR. SMITH KETCHUM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PRJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
